title: I run multiple $10K MRR companies on a $20/month tech stack
author: tradertef
aiHeadline: Steve Hanov: 'Here's how I manage to run multiple $10K MRR companies on a measly $20/month tech stack—because apparently, minimalism is the new black in startup land.'

title: Tell HN: Docker pull fails in Spain due to football Cloudflare block
author: littlecranky67
aiHeadline: Docker pull fails in Spain because, you know, football is more important than your infrastructure—thanks to Cloudflare for proving that sports take priority over code.

title: Pro Max 5x quota exhausted in 1.5 hours despite moderate usage
author: cmaster11
aiHeadline: Pro Max 5x quota exhausted in 1.5 hours? Well, at least it's keeping up with your 'moderate usage'—because nothing says 'efficient' like hitting your limits faster than expected.

title: Seven countries now generate 100% of their electricity from renewable energy
author: mpweiher
aiHeadline: Seven countries now generate 100% of their electricity from renewable energy—while the rest of us are still trying to figure out how to unplug from fossil fuels without causing a global meltdown.

title: Anthropic downgraded cache TTL on March 6th
